title: Ghost Ship Rumors
description: Fishermen at Dalhurst harbor speak in hushed tones about a phantom vessel seen drifting through the morning mist. The ship appears at dawn, crewless and silent, then vanishes before anyone can get close. The Harbor Master wants answers - is it a smuggler's trick, pirates playing games, or something far more sinister from beneath the waves?

objectives.description: Question the fishermen about their sightings
Search the western coastline for signs of the ghost ship
Examine the strange cargo from the wreck
Report your findings to the Harbor Master

notes: This quest leads into the existing harbor_ghost_ship quest, providing setup and context.
